infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: RoadLog uses your location while tracking to mark roads you have traveled.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: RoadLog can keep tracking during a session while the app is in the background.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: RoadLog uses background location only while you choose to track a road session.
